function.name: vcd_info
function.description:
Inspect a VCD file's metadata: timescale, signal count, scope list, time span, and tool provenance. Lowest-cost first call to ground any downstream analysis.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

function.name: vcd_list
function.description:
List signals declared in a VCD file, optionally filtered by a glob/substring pattern. Returns paths, widths, and types.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

function.name: vcd_dump
function.description:
Stream value-change events in time order. Filter by signal pattern and time range.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

function.name: vcd_summary
function.description:
Aggregate per-signal statistics over a time window: classify signals as active/static/undefined, with rise/fall counts and first/last change.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

function.name: vcd_snapshot
function.description:
Return known signal values at a specific time point. Useful for grounding causality questions ('what was the state at the failure time?').

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

function.name: vcd_compare
function.description:
Diff known signal values between two time points; ideal for before/after triage of a state change.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

at.description: Two times separated by comma, e.g. '17.5us,17.7us'

function.name: vcd_search
function.description:
Conditional search over a time window. Returns intervals where the conjunction of equality predicates (e.g. 'valid=1,ready=1') holds, or events when a watched signal changes inside that window.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

condition.description: Comma-separated AND conditions; e.g. 'valid=1,ready=1'. != also supported.

show.description: Comma-separated signals to observe while the condition holds; segments split when shown values change

changed.description: Emit events only when this signal really changes (must resolve to exactly one)

function.name: vcd_protocol_decode
function.description:
Decode bus protocol transactions (AXI4 / APB / UART / SPI). Returns transactions, protocol violations, and performance statistics.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

function.name: vcd_fsm_trace
function.description:
Extract state machine transitions from a state signal. Detects stuck states and provides per-state duration statistics.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

state.description: Signal pattern that must resolve to exactly one signal

stuck_threshold.description: Duration above which a state is reported stuck (default 100us)

function.name: vcd_causality
function.description:
Find potential causes for a signal change at a specific time. Ranks candidates by temporal proximity (40%) and historical correlation (60%); automatically filters clock-like signals.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

effect.description: Effect signal pattern (must resolve to exactly one signal)

at.description: Time when the effect was observed

function.name: vcd_anomaly_detect
function.description:
Detect common waveform anomalies: stuck signals, glitches, metastability, bus contention. Severity-classified output suitable for triage.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.
